specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services, and we've built a reputation as a dependable boatworks that boat owners in the region can count on when it matters most.

Our team handles everything from thorough boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater services, so you get a complete picture of your vessel's condition above and below the waterline. We also specialize in marine AC and climate control systems — keeping your cabin comfortable whether you're cruising the Chesapeake or heading further south — and marine plumbing and sanitation, because a properly functioning system below decks is just as important as what's topside.

At Ben's Boatworks, we understand that your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat it that way. We serve boat owners throughout our South Florida service area, covering a 60-mile radius, including coastal communities, marinas, and inland waterways across the region. Whether you're buying a used vessel and need a pre-purchase survey, dealing with a fouled hull, or troubleshooting a failed AC unit in the middle of summer, we're the crew you want on the job. Our commitment is straightforward — honest work, real expertise, and service you can rely on.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today — 60-mile service area.

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A professional boat survey gives you a detailed, objective assessment of a vessel's structural integrity, mechanical systems, and overall condition — whether you're buying, selling, or renewing insurance. Our inspections cover hull, deck, rigging, electrical, and mechanical components, documented in a clear written report you can actually use.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services address what you can't see from the dock — hull cleaning, zinc replacement, propeller inspection, through-hull checks, and recovery work. Keeping the underwater portion of your vessel clean and maintained directly impacts performance, fuel efficiency, and long-term hull integrity.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: We install, service, and repair marine air conditioning and climate control systems, including chilled water systems, self-contained units, and reverse-cycle systems designed specifically for the marine environment. A properly maintained marine AC system extends equipment life and keeps your vessel comfortable during extended cruising or liveaboard use.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Our marine plumbing and sanitation work covers holding tanks, through-hulls, seacocks, bilge systems, freshwater systems, and marine heads — all installed and serviced to current ABYC standards. A reliable sanitation system isn't just a comfort issue; it's a compliance and safety matter that affects every vessel on the water.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for buyers
Hull cleaning and zinc replacement via professional diving services
Marine AC system installation or repair for liveaboards and cruisers
Holding tank replacement and marine sanitation system overhaul
Underwater propeller inspection and through-hull integrity check
Insurance or damage survey following a collision or grounding
Freshwater system repair and seacock replacement for offshore vessels
